title: Delicate Venezuelan Vermicelli Noodles
description: A pungent and velvety Venezuelan dish featuring vermicelli rice noodles, this recipe is high in protein and perfect for a light dinner
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the vermicelli noodles according to package instructions
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade
Add the chicken breast to the marinade and mix well to coat
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the chicken breast until browned on both sides and cooked through
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside to rest
In the same skillet, add the sliced onion and minced garlic and cook until the onion is translucent
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer
Add the cooked vermicelli noodles to the skillet and toss to combine with the onion and garlic mixture
Slice the cooked chicken breast into thin strips and add to the noodles
Toss everything together to combine and serve hot
